title: Normalize Spacing to 8px Grid
description: Replaced 1,587 hardcoded padding/margin/gap values with var(--space-N) tokens across all 11 files. 80%+ of spacing values now use tokens.

florentino_gate.reason: UX overhaul is critical path for product quality. Approved per TKT-159 audit findings.
